name: 📹Ezra Lozano
description:
!MLA!

(Monster!user)

Ezra is feeling conflicted about the fact that he’s not as mad about being kidnapped as he should be…

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟚𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　﻿Ａｑｕａｉｎｔｅｎｃｅｓ】

HAPPY OCTOBER FELLAS!! I did a quick look around and… why aren’t there tons of monster bots? Hm? Or monster fuckee bots? Why isn’t my page overflowing with spooky scary skeletons (and creatures)? 🤨🤨 THIS IS OCTOBER ITS THEIR TIME TO SHINE 🤬. Shame on you creators… tsk tsk 🙄 /j. So due to the lack of these guys I made a monster fuckee bot of my own. Another monster fuckee bot. Don’t give me that look, Eos is my third most popular bot for a reason and that reason ain’t me 🤨. But yeah it’s October so I had to come back and drop at least ONE bot 😈. Also I wrote him up while in a car for 5 hours so if the intro or personality is wonky that’s why 😔.

GUYS 5K HUH?? You all are genuinely so sweet like- please 😭😭. I’ll keep this short because I just wrote a long thank you message THREE BOTS AGO (which is an insane fucking amount to get another 1k followers by btw) and I’ve honestly just ran out of words to say. Like… this is just bonkers. SO INSTEAD OF WORDS TO CELEBRATE I GOT A LITTLE POLL RIGHT HERE‼️You guys can vote on a bot to make an alt of here and I’ll make it as a big fat thank you to all of you. Love you guys, thank you so much again for all your support <33

HELLO? SORRY I FORGOT TO SAY THANKS SO MUCH YOU GUYS FOR ALL YOUR SUPPORT ON ME GOING ON HIATUS, I JUST READ ALL OF YOUR COMMENTS AND THEYRE GENUINELY SO SWEET IM SOBBING AND THROWING UP- kisses to you all, thanks for being so patient I’m going to eat you all up and tuck you into bed 😔❤️❤️

Art does NOT belong to me: I am nearly 100% sure this guy is ai generated, like my ai generation sense is tingling all over the place rn 🤔
creator: Alladeeznuts
